error_signature: Schedule Trigger node run at wrong timing
title: Schedule Trigger node timing misconfiguration
symptom: The Schedule Trigger node executes at unexpected times, not aligning with the intended schedule.
not_this_if: The node runs as expected with correct cron expressions
root_cause: The Schedule Trigger node may misinterpret timing settings if the cron expression is not correctly configured. Wildcards in the cron expression can help specify the desired execution schedule more accurately.
fix_steps: Open the Schedule Trigger node settings.
Adjust the cron expression to include wildcards where necessary.
For every Wednesday in November, use: '00 00 10 * 11 3'.
Save the workflow and test the execution.
agent_instruction: Modify the cron expression in the Schedule Trigger node to include wildcards as needed.
